description: Git workflow configuration for multi-agent system

comments.version: v0.0.2 - Tech Stack Agnostic Multi-Agent System
comments.base_branch: Base branch for PM/Coding agents when creating new branches (e.g., main, dev)
comments.qa_strategy: QA agent creates test branch based on feature branch of same ticket
comments.auto_create: Whether to auto-create branch if it doesn't exist
comments.auto_commit: Whether to auto-commit after work completion (false recommended - human review before commit)
comments.auto_push: Whether to auto-push (false recommended - human review before push)
